resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def isPalindrome(self, s: str) -> bool:
        s = ''.join(c for c in s if c.isalnum()).lower()
        return s == s[::-1]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses a generator expression to filter out non-alphanumeric characters and convert the string to lowercase. It then checks if the resulting string is equal to its reverse. This approach has a linear time complexity and space complexity due to the creation of the filtered string.
